org.firstinspires.ftc.teamcode.util

Class LimelightCalibrator.CalibrationResult

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.firstinspires.ftc.teamcode.util.LimelightCalibrator.CalibrationResult
  • Enclosing class:
    LimelightCalibrator

    public static class LimelightCalibrator.CalibrationResult
extends java.lang.Object
    Result of a calibration operation.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      double calibratedHeading 
      double calibratedX
      Calibration offsets (to add to Constants)
      double calibratedY 
      double distance
      Distance to tag (inches)
      double expectedHeading 
      double expectedX
      Expected position (what we placed the robot at)
      double expectedY 
      double measuredHeading 
      double measuredX
      Measured position (what Limelight reported)
      double measuredY 
      boolean success
      Whether calibration was successful
      int tagCount
      Number of tags visible
      int tagID
      Tag ID that was detected

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      CalibrationResult() 
      CalibrationResult(double expectedX, double expectedY, double expectedHeading, double measuredX, double measuredY, double measuredHeading, int tagID, int tagCount, double distance)
      Creates a successful calibration result.

      Gets a formatted string for Constants.java.

      Prints detailed calibration report to telemetry.
